calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS SETTLEMENT. Appearances: Jonah D. Mitchell of Reed Smith LLP (659.5917) for defendants and responding parties; Robert B. Hancock of Pacific Justice Center (310.1940) for plaintiff and moving party. Discussed and the court granted the motion for final approval. Plaintiff is awarded attorneys fees of $30,000. Judgment signed in open court. (302/AJR) Judge: A. James Robertson, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS SETTLEMENT. Appearances: Robert B. Hancock of Pacific Justice (310.1940) for plaintiff and moving party; Jonah D. Mitchell of Reed Smith LLP (659.5917) for defendants and responding parties. Discussed and the court continued the matter to February 1, 2011 for more information on the number of individuals who requested cash refunds. (302/AJR) Judge: A. James Robertson, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Hancock, Esq. of Pacific Justice Center, 415-310-1940 for plaintiff and moving party Katherine Chamberlin
Stuart Shanus, Esq. of Reed Smith, 310-734-5240 for defendant and opposing party Aveda Experience Center Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court GRANTED PLAINTIFF KATHERINE CHAMBERLIN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement. COUNSEL TO APPEAR ON JANUARY 31, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 502 AT 9:30AM FOR FINAL APPROVAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 (301/AJR)
